name: Shinhokoku Steel Corporation
summary: Shinhokoku Steel Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells special steel products in Japan. It offers low thermal expansion alloys for semiconductor and FPD parts for manufacturing equipment; durable steel and heat resistance steel for steel works; and low thermal expansion alloy precision polishing plates for various wafers. The company also provides various alloys, such as rolling materials, drawing materials, welding rods; piercing plugs for seamless steel pipes; and nonferrous alloys, including Ti lapping and Sn alloys for lapping plates. Shinhokoku Steel Corporation was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Kawagoe, Japan.
